title: Why were Louis Sammartino reaction videos struck? YouTuber Outdoor Boys move fuels LosPollosTV copyright fight and online outrage
summary_full: Louis Sammartino’s LosPollosTV faces backlash after Outdoor Boys content linked to Luke Nichols triggers copyright strikes. His viral reaction clip and his father’s “disturbing” remark fueled debate. Fans largely backed original creators, questioning reaction videos. The clash highlights a bigger issue, how fair use works online and where creators draw the line between content sharing and ownership.
